evals.prompt: Generate Day 2 of the 365-day Bodhisattvacharyavatara practice plan. It covers Chapter 4, verses 45-46. Save it to my Plans folder.
evals.expected_output: A complete 7-section markdown file in Tibetan saved as Day-002-Ch4-v45-46.md, with the correct fixed refuge/dedication prayers, and freshly generated motivation, benefits, commentary, daily application, and glossary sections specific to Ch4:45-46.
expectations: The file contains all 7 sections numbered ༡། through ༧།
Section 1 contains the exact fixed refuge prayer (བྱང་ཆུབ་སྙིང་པོར་མཆིས་ཀྱི་བར།)
Section 6 contains the exact fixed dedication prayer (བདག་གིས་བྱང་ཆུབ་སྤྱོད་པ་ལ།)
The header shows Tibetan numerals ༢ for day 2 and ༤ for chapter 4
Section 3 has exactly 3 benefit bullet points
Section 5 has exactly 3 daily application points
Section 7 has at least 3 glossary terms
The file is saved as Day-002-Ch4-v45-46.md

evals.prompt: I'm on day 51 of the practice plan — can you make today's Spyod 'jug session? I believe that's Chapter 6, verses 9-10. Save it to my Plans folder.
evals.expected_output: A complete 7-section Tibetan practice plan for Day 51, covering the famous Ch6:9-10 verses on patience and anger. Commentary should draw on the rich traditional teaching on these verses (the enemy as teacher). Saved as Day-051-Ch6-v9-10.md.
expectations: The file contains all 7 sections numbered ༡། through ༧།
Section 1 contains the exact fixed refuge prayer verbatim
Section 6 contains the exact fixed dedication and aspiration prayers verbatim
The header shows day number ༥༡ in Tibetan numerals
Commentary in Section 4 reflects the patience/anger teaching of Chapter 6
Section 3 has exactly 3 benefit points
Section 5 has exactly 3 practical application points
The file is saved correctly as Day-051-Ch6-v9-10.md

evals.prompt: Please create the practice plan for day 180 of the Bodhisattvacharyavatara study. I'd like it in both Tibetan and with English notes in the commentary sections if possible.
evals.expected_output: A complete 7-section plan for Day 180 (Chapter 8, verses 160-162 per the schedule). The fixed sections must remain in Tibetan only. The generated commentary sections may include English notes/translations. Saved as Day-180-Ch8-v160-162.md.
expectations: The file contains all 7 sections
Fixed prayers (sections 1 and 6) are in Tibetan only — no English
Commentary sections contain English notes alongside Tibetan
Header correctly shows day number ༡༨༠ in Tibetan numerals
Verse content matches Chapter 8 (meditative concentration) themes
Section 3 has exactly 3 benefit points
Section 5 has exactly 3 daily application points
File is saved as Day-180-Ch8-v160-162.md
